---
name: RFC (Request for Change)
about: Formal proposal for a product, architecture, or process change
title: '[RFC] '
labels: rfc
assignees: ''
---

> Use this template for significant changes that require Product Owner approval.  
> After filing this issue, create `docs/07_RFC/RFC-NNNN-title.md` with the full proposal.

## RFC Summary

One paragraph describing the change and why it matters.

## RFC File

Link to: `docs/07_RFC/RFC-NNNN-title.md`

## Status

- [ ] Draft
- [ ] Under Review
- [ ] Approved → Decision ID: DEC-NNN
- [ ] Rejected
- [ ] Deferred

## Checklist

- [ ] RFC file created in `docs/07_RFC/`
- [ ] All template sections completed
- [ ] Charter compliance checked
- [ ] Cost estimate included
- [ ] Mobile impact assessed
